race.comment: The scratching of PRAVAHA opens this race right up. WILD RUBY (9) has had plenty of chances and while she hasn't been able to get the job done in nine starts, she's placed five times and a repeat of any of those runs would be good enough to make her a key player in this. MAPLETON HILL (7) debuts on the home track and has not been knocked around in two jumpouts to date, the most recent when comfortably accounting for a rival here in BAROSSA VALLEY. KRASNOLUDEK (6) ran his best race yet last start when put on speed and while drawn out that looks his best chance to play a role here. BAROSSA VALLEY (3) has been gelded since the debut run and deserves another chance.
